---
title: "Test Delay Predictions"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Reading the Data

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(slider)
library(rsample)
library(pROC)
library(xgboost)
```

```{r}
# Train data
flights2023 <- read_csv("data/flights2023.csv")
flights2024 <- read_csv("data/flights2024.csv")

# Combine
flights <- rbind(flights2023, flights2024)

# Keep only departing PIT flights if arrivals are included
# Remove cancelled and diverted flights
arrivals <- flights |>
  filter(DEST == "PIT",
         CANCELLED == 0,
         DIVERTED == 0)

flights <- flights %>%
  filter(ORIGIN == "PIT",
         CANCELLED == 0,
         DIVERTED == 0)
```

```{r}
head(flights)
```

## Feature Engineering

```{r}
# Quarters redefined
flights <- flights |>
  mutate(SEASON = case_when(
    MONTH %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Winter",
    MONTH %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ "Spring",
    MONTH %in% c(6, 7, 8) ~ "Summer",
    MONTH %in% c(9, 10, 11) ~ "Fall"
  ))
```

```{r}
# Hours since midnight (numerical)
flights <- flights |>
  mutate(DEP_HOUR = CRS_DEP_TIME %/% 100,
         DEP_MIN = CRS_DEP_TIME %% 100,
         DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT = DEP_HOUR + DEP_MIN / 60)
```

```{r}
# Sort once in chronological order
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME)

# Historical carrier delay rate (23-24)
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_delay_rate = mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier delay rate within the same day
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_day_delay_rate =
      lag(
        cumsum(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(CARRIER_DELAY, 0) > 0),
        default = 0
      ) / pmax(row_number() - 1, 1),
    carrier_day_delay_rate = if_else(row_number() == 1, 0, carrier_day_delay_rate)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier-route delay rate
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, DEST) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_route_delay_rate = mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical destination delay rate
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(DEST) %>%
  mutate(
    dest_delay_rate = mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical carrier-month delay rate
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, MONTH) %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_month_delay_rate = mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Historical late-aircraft delay rate for each carrier-flight number pair
flights <- flights %>%
  group_by(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, OP_CARRIER_FL_NUM) %>%
  mutate(
    flightnum_late_aircraft_delay_rate = mean(DEP_DEL15)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# Check for weather events in the past 3 hours
flights <- flights %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT) %>%
  group_by(FL_DATE) %>%
  mutate(
    weather_event = as.integer(DEP_DEL15 == 1 & coalesce(WEATHER_DELAY, 0) > 0),

    weather_delay_rate_3hr = slide_index_dbl(
      weather_event,
      DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT,
      ~ mean(head(.x, -1)),   # exclude current flight
      .before = 3,
      .complete = FALSE
    ),
    
    # If NA, fill with 0s
    weather_delay_rate_3hr = coalesce(weather_delay_rate_3hr, 0)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# Indicator for long weekend
flights <- flights %>%
  mutate(
    weekend_group = case_when(
      DAY_OF_WEEK %in% c(5, 6, 7, 1) ~ "Long Weekend",
      DAY_OF_WEEK %in% c(2, 3, 4) ~ "Weekday"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
# Add 3 features: is the flight the first flight of the given tail number in the data, is the arriving flight delayed, what is the turnaround time between actual arrival and scheduled departure

# Format arrival time in the same way
arrivals <- arrivals |>
  mutate(ARR_HOUR = ARR_TIME %/% 100,
         ARR_MIN = ARR_TIME %% 100,
         ARR_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT = ARR_HOUR + ARR_MIN / 60)

for (i in 1:nrow(flights)) {
  print(i)
  # For loop to do this for every flight
  flight <- flights[i, ]
  
  # Filter for all arrivals of the same tail number and day before the scheduled departure time
  same_flight_arrival <- arrivals |>
    filter(ARR_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT < flight$DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT,
           FL_DATE == flight$FL_DATE,
           TAIL_NUM == flight$TAIL_NUM) |>
    # Get the latest arrival, if it exists, make sure only 1 flight is there
    slice_max(ARR_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT, n = 1, with_ties = F)
  
  # Calculate features
  if (nrow(same_flight_arrival) == 0) {
    flights[i, "is_first"] = 1
    flights[i, "is_incoming_delayed"] = 0
    flights[i, "turnaround_time"] = 0
  } else {
    flights[i, "is_first"] = 0
    flights[i, "is_incoming_delayed"] = same_flight_arrival$ARR_DEL15
    flights[i, "turnaround_time"] = flight$DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT - same_flight_arrival$ARR_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT
  }
}
```

```{r}
head(flights)
```

```{r}
write.csv(flights, "data/flights_all.csv")
```

## Test Data

```{r}
# Read files
flights2025_visible <- read_csv("data/flights2025_visible.csv") %>%
  mutate(source = "visible")
# Before combining visible and guess, add original row number
flights2025_guess <- read_csv("data/flights2025_guess.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    source = "guess",
    original_order = row_number()
  )

# Combine so guess flights can use earlier visible flights
flights2025 <- bind_rows(
  flights2025_visible,
  flights2025_guess
) %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME)

# Keep PIT departures and arrivals
arrivals2025 <- flights2025 %>%
  filter(
    source == "visible",
    DEST == "PIT",
    CANCELLED == 0,
    DIVERTED == 0
  )

flights2025 <- flights2025 %>%
  filter(
    ORIGIN == "PIT",
    CANCELLED == 0 | is.na(CANCELLED),
    DIVERTED == 0 | is.na(DIVERTED)
  )

# Join lookup tables from 2023-2024 training data
carrier_lookup <- flights %>%
  select(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, carrier_delay_rate) %>%
  distinct()

carrier_route_lookup <- flights %>%
  select(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, DEST, carrier_route_delay_rate) %>%
  distinct()

dest_lookup <- flights %>%
  select(DEST, dest_delay_rate) %>%
  distinct()

carrier_month_lookup <- flights %>%
  select(OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER, MONTH, carrier_month_delay_rate) %>%
  distinct()

flights2025 <- flights2025 %>%
  left_join(carrier_lookup, by = "OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER") %>%
  left_join(
    carrier_route_lookup,
    by = c("OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER", "DEST")
  ) %>%
  left_join(dest_lookup, by = "DEST") %>%
  left_join(
    carrier_month_lookup,
    by = c("OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER", "MONTH")
  )

# Handle missing joined values
flights2025 <- flights2025 %>%
  filter(DEST != "SDF") %>%
  mutate(
    carrier_route_delay_rate = coalesce(
      carrier_route_delay_rate,
      carrier_delay_rate
    )
  )

# Recalculate 2025-specific features
flights2025 <- flights2025 %>%
  mutate(
    SEASON = case_when(
      MONTH %in% c(12, 1, 2) ~ "Winter",
      MONTH %in% c(3, 4, 5) ~ "Spring",
      MONTH %in% c(6, 7, 8) ~ "Summer",
      TRUE ~ "Fall"
    ),
    DEP_HOUR = CRS_DEP_TIME %/% 100,
    DEP_MIN = CRS_DEP_TIME %% 100,
    DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT = DEP_HOUR + DEP_MIN / 60
  ) %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, CRS_DEP_TIME)

# Carrier delay rate earlier that same day
# Only visible flights contribute
flights2025 <- flights2025 %>%
  group_by(FL_DATE, OP_UNIQUE_CARRIER) %>%
  mutate(
    known_carrier_delay = if_else(
      source == "visible" &
        coalesce(DEP_DEL15, 0) == 1 &
        coalesce(CARRIER_DELAY, 0) > 0,
      1,
      0
    ),

    visible_count = lag(
      cumsum(source == "visible"),
      default = 0
    ),

    carrier_day_delay_rate = lag(
      cumsum(known_carrier_delay),
      default = 0
    ) / pmax(visible_count, 1),

    carrier_day_delay_rate = if_else(
      visible_count == 0,
      0,
      carrier_day_delay_rate
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Weather delay rate in previous 3 hours
# Only visible flights contribute
flights2025 <- flights2025 %>%
  arrange(FL_DATE, DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT) %>%
  group_by(FL_DATE) %>%
  mutate(
    weather_event = if_else(
      source == "visible" &
        coalesce(DEP_DEL15, 0) == 1 &
        coalesce(WEATHER_DELAY, 0) > 0,
      1,
      0
    ),

    row_id = row_number(),

    weather_delay_rate_3hr = slide_index_dbl(
      row_id,
      DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT,
      ~ {
        idx <- head(.x, -1)

        if (length(idx) == 0) return(0)

        prior_visible <- idx[source[idx] == "visible"]

        if (length(prior_visible) == 0) return(0)

        mean(weather_event[prior_visible])
      },
      .before = 3,
      .complete = FALSE
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Weekend feature
flights2025 <- flights2025 %>%
  mutate(
    weekend_group = case_when(
      DAY_OF_WEEK %in% c(5, 6, 7, 1) ~ "Long Weekend",
      TRUE ~ "Weekday"
    )
  )

# Prepare visible arrivals only
arrivals2025 <- arrivals2025 %>%
  mutate(
    ARR_HOUR = ARR_TIME %/% 100,
    ARR_MIN = ARR_TIME %% 100,
    ARR_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT = ARR_HOUR + ARR_MIN / 60
  )

# Incoming-flight features
flights2025$is_first <- 0
flights2025$is_incoming_delayed <- 0
flights2025$turnaround_time <- 0

for (i in 1:nrow(flights2025)) {

  flight <- flights2025[i, ]

  same_flight_arrival <- arrivals2025 %>%
    filter(
      FL_DATE == flight$FL_DATE,
      TAIL_NUM == flight$TAIL_NUM,
      ARR_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT < flight$DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT
    ) %>%
    slice_max(
      ARR_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT,
      n = 1,
      with_ties = FALSE
    )

  if (nrow(same_flight_arrival) == 0) {

    flights2025$is_first[i] <- 1
    flights2025$is_incoming_delayed[i] <- 0
    flights2025$turnaround_time[i] <- 0

  } else {

    flights2025$is_first[i] <- 0
    flights2025$is_incoming_delayed[i] <- same_flight_arrival$ARR_DEL15
    flights2025$turnaround_time[i] <-
      flight$DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT -
      same_flight_arrival$ARR_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT
  }
}
```

## Filtering

```{r}
# Rename datasets
train_data <- flights
test_data <- flights2025 %>%
  filter(source == "guess")
```

```{r}
# Select columns for train data
train_data <- train_data %>%
  select(
    YEAR,
    SEASON,
    DEST_STATE_ABR,
    DISTANCE,
    DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT,
    carrier_delay_rate,
    carrier_day_delay_rate,
    carrier_route_delay_rate,
    dest_delay_rate,
    carrier_month_delay_rate,
    weather_delay_rate_3hr,
    is_first,
    is_incoming_delayed,
    turnaround_time,
    DEP_DEL15
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    is_first = as.factor(is_first),
    is_incoming_delayed = as.factor(is_incoming_delayed),
    DEP_DEL15 = as.factor(DEP_DEL15)
  )
```

```{r}
# Select columns for test data
# Keep only guess flights for prediction
test_data <- flights2025 %>%
  filter(source == "guess") %>%
  select(
    YEAR,
    SEASON,
    DEST_STATE_ABR,
    DISTANCE,
    DEP_HOURS_SINCE_MIDNIGHT,
    carrier_delay_rate,
    carrier_day_delay_rate,
    carrier_route_delay_rate,
    dest_delay_rate,
    carrier_month_delay_rate,
    weather_delay_rate_3hr,
    is_first,
    is_incoming_delayed,
    turnaround_time
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    is_first = factor(is_first),
    is_incoming_delayed = factor(is_incoming_delayed)
  )
```

```{r}
# Check order is the same
all(test_data$original_order == 1:nrow(test_data))
```

## XGBoost

```{r}
# Formula with interactions
form <- DEP_DEL15 ~ . - YEAR +
  is_first:is_incoming_delayed +
  is_first:turnaround_time
```

```{r}
# Training matrix
x_train <- model.matrix(form, data = train_data)[, -1]
y_train <- as.numeric(as.character(train_data$DEP_DEL15))

# Test matrix
x_test <- model.matrix(
  ~ .,
  data = test_data
)[, -1]

# Add missing columns and align order
missing_cols <- setdiff(colnames(x_train), colnames(x_test))

for (col in missing_cols) {
  x_test <- cbind(x_test, 0)
  colnames(x_test)[ncol(x_test)] <- col
}

# Drop any extra columns and reorder
x_test <- x_test[, colnames(x_train)]

# Convert to xgboost matrix format
dtrain <- xgb.DMatrix(data = x_train, label = y_train)
dtest <- xgb.DMatrix(data = x_test)
```

```{r}
# Set model parameters
params <- list(
  objective = "binary:logistic",
  eval_metric = "auc",
  max_depth = 4,
  eta = 0.05,
  subsample = 0.8,
  colsample_bytree = 0.8
)

# Cross-validation to determine best number of rounds
cv_xgb <- xgb.cv(
  params = params,
  data = dtrain,
  nrounds = 500,
  nfold = 5,
  early_stopping_rounds = 20,
  verbose = 0
)

# Best number of boosting rounds
best_nrounds <- cv_xgb$early_stop$best_iteration
```

```{r}
# Fit final model
xgb_model <- xgb.train(
  params = params,
  data = dtrain,
  nrounds = best_nrounds,
  verbose = 0
)
```

```{r}
# Predicted probabilities on test set
delay.guesses <- predict(
  xgb_model,
  newdata = dtest
)
```

## Creating Submission File

```{r}
test.acc <- 0.7599
team.name <- "Alcholics Anonymous"
```

```{r}
save(list = c("delay.guesses", "test.acc", "team.name"),
file = "AlcoholicsAnonymous462final.RData")
```
